topics.title: Hollywood Movies and Weekend Plans
topics.summary: The studio discusses the success of recent films like American Gangster and Bee Movie, the frustrations of the audition process, and details regarding a weekend dinner and play in New Jersey.

topics.title: Sports, Radio Industry, and Halloween Debates
topics.summary: The studio discusses a recent theater outing, critiques of NFL teams like the Jets and Patriots, the state of local radio competition, listener feedback on guest interviews, and a humorous debate over Pat Robertson's stance on Halloween.

topics.title: Comedy Industry Conflicts
topics.summary: The studio explores internal tensions regarding payment disputes, professional etiquette, and personal grievances among a group of stand-up comedians.

topics.title: Comedy Tour Tensions and Stand-Up Conflicts
topics.summary: The studio explores internal friction among a group of comedians regarding tour finances, personal grievances over performance roles, and the professional risks of pursuing stand-up comedy.

topics.title: Legal Disputes and Media Publicity
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding the legal implications of shared slogans, the impact of media coverage on personal reputations, and the complications of being associated with public figures in news reports.

topics.title: Body Works Exhibit and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the graphic details of a human body exhibition, the theft of a dancer's dogs in New York, and recent headlines involving King Tut and Heather Mills.

topics.title: Celebrity Divorce and Competition Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses a celebrity divorce involving Paul McCartney, legal strategies for media coverage, and the details of a competition between two women.

topics.title: Queefing World Championship Competition
topics.summary: The studio hosts a competition between two women to determine the world champion of queefing based on duration, volume, and frequency.

topics.title: Entourage Cast and Celebrity Encounters
topics.summary: The studio features guests from the show Entourage discussing their experiences with celebrity figures like the Hilton sisters, a physical altercation between Kid Rock and Tommy Lee at the MTV Awards, and various personal anecdotes regarding past relationships and public incidents.

topics.title: Entourage Cast and Relationship Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio features guests from the show Entourage discussing their personal lives, dating experiences with models, and a documentary about one actor's search for his biological father.

topics.title: Celebrity Relationships and Dating Stories
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding personal dating experiences, the physical attributes of past partners like Nicky Cox, and Kevin's recent interactions with a dancer from Dancing with the Stars.

topics.title: Entourage Cast and Oprah Academy Controversy
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion with cast members of Entourage regarding their roles, upcoming book signings, and a critique of the management and safety issues at the Oprah Winfrey Girls Academy in South Africa.

topics.title: Oprah Academy and Workplace Conflict
topics.summary: The studio discusses Oprah Winfrey’s response to allegations at her academy, followed by a tense discussion regarding a professional rift between colleagues Sal and Artie.

topics.title: Richard Christie's Reunion with a Long-Lost Friend
topics.summary: The studio features Richard Christie discussing his emotional reunion with a long-lost friend from Missouri and the upcoming simultaneous viewing of "Interview with the Vampire."

topics.title: New York City Marathon Results and News
topics.summary: The show covers the winners of the New York City Marathon, a deer attack on a hunter in Colorado, an abuse investigation involving an Oprah Winfrey school employee, and various entertainment news stories.

topics.title: Hollywood Writer Strike and Entertainment News
topics.summary: The studio covers the Hollywood writer strike, legal battles involving Paul McCartney and Larry King, military policy on adult content, and various celebrity news updates.

Benjamin Franklin.
That's right.

Of course.
